text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A voice calls out to Gold Ship in her dreams,
rousing her spirit. There's no time to waste! Gold
Ship ventures out in search of Eden.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Convinced that Eden is a land of the divine, Gold
Ship decides to become a god in order to reach
it. However, Super Creek stands in her path.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite Gold Ship's self-proclaimed deity powers,
Super Creek deflects her attacks like it's child's
play—for even gods have their makers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Creek's maternal spirit transcends divinity, and
Gold Ship suffers a crushing defeat in the face of
her motherly love. To be continued...
